prompts.text: Inspect crop stress in the north field using multispectral imaging.
Map field boundaries and elevation for spring planting layout.
Apply pesticide in grid pattern over orchard block B with drift monitoring.
Assess flood damage to crops along the eastern levee after the storm.
Perform border reconnaissance over sector 7 during night hours.
Track a suspected vehicle convoy moving along the ridgeline road.
Provide overwatch for friendly unit movement through the urban grid.
Conduct area surveillance of the industrial park perimeter for 6 hours.
Monitor crowd flow and ingress points during the stadium event.
Loiter over the pipeline ROW to detect unauthorized ground activity.
Search for survivors near the flooded riverbank at first light.
Thermal sweep of the collapsed structure zone for heat signatures.
Rapid disaster assessment of bridge integrity after the earthquake.
Wide-area search for missing hikers in the alpine basin west of the peak.
